per_sentence.sentence: The big dog chased the small cat in the park
Every student who passed the exam received a certificate
The professor told the student that the results were significant
Someone believes that every child deserves a good education
The old man carried a heavy wooden box down the hill
The woman who the man saw quickly left the building

q2_convergence_mechanism.summary: FFN critical at 4 layers, ATTN critical at 5 layers (of 9 tested)
